notes: Generator enforcement is intentionally limited to safe single-column IN, BETWEEN, and numeric bound checks.
Composite, cross-column, function, regex, and OR-based CHECKs are captured as evidence and left to database validation.

captured.expression: ((expiration_date IS NULL) OR (effective_date IS NULL) OR (expiration_date >= effective_date))
((expiration_date IS NULL) OR (effective_date IS NULL) OR (expiration_date >= effective_date))

parentSampling.fkValidity: Child values are drawn only from retained/generated parent keys or tuples.
parentSampling.distribution: Exact for the generated rows kept in memory.

bulkLoadCapability.portableFallback: JDBC batch or portable multi-row INSERT

dataPath.maskedRealSubsetPath: Use DataScope/provisioning flows for subset-from-source plus masking policies.
dataPath.note: Synthetic generation does not read production rows; masked real subsets are a separate TDM path.

governance.rbac: Endpoint permissions separate synthetic.manage, synthetic.run, synthetic.direct.run, synthetic.approve, cancel, and export.
governance.makerChecker: Database saved jobs require approval by a different user before run.
governance.eSignature: Approval and rejection require a reason/note recorded with the saved job, audit log, and run lineage.
governance.cleanupScope: In-memory monitor entries are trimmed after completion; persisted lineage remains for the retention policy.

strengths: Referential relationships present across banking entities
Risk/status/fraud/KYC columns included for scenario coverage
gaps: Add CASE, LOOKUP, TEMPLATE, or DATE_AFTER rules for within-row consistency
